zh.lifeSummary: 當Colonel Richard Lovelace於1396年出生在英國肯特貝黑斯達時，他的父親John Lovelace III36歲，母親Johanna Ann Wentworth31歲。他於1419年與Elizabeth Althea Eynsham在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1466年4月7日在英國肯特享年70歲，埋葬在英國肯特貝黑斯達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Colonel Richard Lovelace于1396年出生在英国肯特貝黑斯達时，他的父亲John Lovelace III36岁，母亲Johanna Ann Wentworth31岁。他于1419年与Elizabeth Althea Eynsham在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1466年4月7日在英国肯特享年70岁，埋葬在英国肯特貝黑斯達。

nameMeanings.name: Lovelace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Loveless  . The spelling is apparently theresult of folk etymology, which understood the word as a nickname fora dandy fond of lace. The modern sense of this word is, however, notattested until the 16th century and at the time of surname formationit meant only ‘cord’ or ‘shoelace’.

variants.name: Loveless
meanings: nickname from Middle English loveles ‘loveless, without love’, probably in the sense ‘fancy free’.
some early examples, such as Richard Lovelas (Kent 1344), may have as their second element Middle English las(se) ‘girl’, ‘maiden’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Colonel Richard Lovelace was born in 1396, in Bethersden, Kent, England, his father, John Lovelace III, was 36 and his mother, Johanna Ann Wentworth, was 31. He married Elizabeth Althea Eynsham in 1419, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 April 1466, in Kent, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Bethersden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Colonel Richard Lovelace est né en 1396, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Lovelace III, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Johanna Ann Wentworth, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Althea Eynsham en 1419, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 avril 1466, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Colonel Richard Lovelace 1396 in Bethersden, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Lovelace III 36 und seine Mutter Johanna Ann Wentworth 31. Er hat 1419 in London, England Elizabeth Althea Eynsham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. April 1466 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in Bethersden, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Colonel Richard Lovelace è nato il nel 1396 nel Bethersden, Kent, England, il suo padre, John Lovelace III, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Ann Wentworth, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Althea Eynsham nel 1419, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 aprile 1466, nel Kent, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Bethersden, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Colonel Richard Lovelaceが1396年にイギリスケントベスエルスデンで生まれた時，父John Lovelace IIIは36歳，母Johanna Ann Wentworthは31歳であった。1419年にイギリスロンドンでElizabeth Althea Eynshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1466年4月7日にイギリスケントで70歳で死去し，イギリスケントベスエルスデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Colonel Richard Lovelace(이)가 1396년 영국 켄트 베더즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lovelace III(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Ann Wentworth(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1419년 영국 런던에서 Elizabeth Althea Eynsham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 4월 7일 영국 켄트에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 베더즈든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Colonel Richard Lovelace nasceu em 1396, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Lovelace III, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Ann Wentworth, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Althea Eynsham em 1419, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de abril de 1466, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Colonel Richard Lovelace родился в 1396 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Lovelace III было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Ann Wentworth, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Althea Eynsham в 1419 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 апреля 1466 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Colonel Richard Lovelace nació en 1396, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Lovelace III, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Johanna Ann Wentworth, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Althea Eynsham en 1419, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de abril de 1466, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra.
